concerns.text: FR-007 contains a placeholder '[deferred]' in the error calculation formula: '|computed_value - ground_truth_value| / |ground_truth_value| × [deferred]'. This breaks the requirement definition. The formula for percentage error is standard (× 100). The '[deferred]' marker is likely a copy-paste error from the 'Assumptions' or 'Edge Cases' sections where empirical thresholds are deferred, but a calculation formula must be complete. Please replace '[deferred]' with '100' to define the metric correctly.
